/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG   -m64    CMakeFiles/OpenCLTemplate.dir/src/OpenCLTemplate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenCLTemplate.dir/src/OpenCLTemplateMain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenCLTemplate.dir/src/Timer.cpp.o -o /mnt/c/Users/root/source/repos/OpenCLTemplate2.9/bin/x86_64/Release/OpenCLTemplate  -Wl,-rpath,/mnt/c/Users/root/source/repos/OpenCLTemplate2.9/OpenCL/lib /mnt/c/Users/root/source/repos/OpenCLTemplate2.9/OpenCL/lib/libOpenCL.so -lrt
